MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John O'Grady for and with David Hayes (Executor).

Mr. O'Grady stated that he was waiting for the cooperation of a Third Party and requested an extension to October 6, 2008, which the court granted.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.
